columns.column_name: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: From Table 1, on page 5, locate the column 'High Volume - Darolutamide (n = 497)'. The number of patients is 497. The total number of patients in the Darolutamide arm is the sum of patients in 'High Volume - Darolutamide (n = 497)' and 'Low Volume - Darolutamide (n = 154)', which is 497 + 154 = 651. Calculate the percentage as (497 / 651) * 100.
columns.column_name_raw: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Treatment
